items.title: I will not let racist abuse define me - Danso
items.summary: Tottenham Hotspur defender Kevin Danso says he will not be defined by racist abuse after being targeted on social media.

items.title: Sean Payton doesn't rule out adding another quarterback
items.summary: The Broncos have three quarterbacks on the roster.

items.title: Familiar failings but calm Corteen-Coleman provides England optimism
items.summary: Debutant Tilly Corteen-Coleman and stand-in captain Charlie Dean provide optimism for England despite underwhelming win over New Zealand.
